default.description: Aryze builds payment products for operators that need clearer control, clearer evidence, and payment flows that hold up in practice.
default.ogDescription: Built in Copenhagen for better money movement. Pay by Bank, Stablecoin Factory, Digital Cash.

payByBank.title: Pay by Bank
payByBank.description: Pay by Bank helps UK merchants reduce card friction and understand potential payment savings.

stablecoinFactory.title: Stablecoin Factory
stablecoinFactory.description: Stablecoin Factory is a coming-soon Aryze product for simpler stablecoin deployment.

digitalCash.title: Digital Cash
digitalCash.description: Digital Cash is a coming-soon Aryze product for licensed institutions operating digital money.

sandboxAccess.title: Sandbox Access
sandboxAccess.description: Request sandbox access for Aryze Pay by Bank and share your company, payment setup, and testing intent.

hero.title: Built in Copenhagen for better money movement.
hero.body: Aryze is a Danish fintech company founded in 2017. We build payment products for operators that need clearer control, clearer evidence, and payment flows that hold up in practice.
hero.teamBody: The team behind Aryze cares about details, controls, and what happens after launch.

mission.label: Mission
mission.body: Build payment products that give merchants more control, clearer evidence, and fewer operational compromises.

vision.label: Vision
vision.body: A payments environment where merchants can move faster without sacrificing clarity, control, or accountability.

values.label: Values
values.body: Clear rules, evidence over story, operator-first design, and scaling without losing control.

payByBank.body: For UK payment-driven merchants where card friction, settlement, or chargebacks affect performance.

stablecoinFactory.body: For builders and technical teams with a clear stablecoin idea.

digitalCash.body: For already-licensed institutions with digital cash operating needs.

bottomCta.title: See what fixed pricing could mean for your business.
bottomCta.body: Run the savings calculator on Pay by Bank, then book a call to walk through your payment flow.

hero.title: Stop letting card fees scale with your growth.
hero.body: For casinos, iGaming, and high-volume merchants that need predictable pricing, fewer disputes, and faster deposits via Mastercard Payment Rails.
hero.metricValue: Casinos, iGaming, betting, and high-volume deposit flows.

pain.title: Is your checkout costing you?
pain.body: The three costs most high-volume merchants feel first.

fees.title: High card fees
fees.body: Percentage costs grow with every deposit.

chargebacks.title: Chargebacks drain time
chargebacks.body: Disputes cost revenue and operational focus.

abandon.title: Players abandon deposits
abandon.body: Card details add friction at checkout.

value.title: What merchants gain.
value.body: A new payment method without rebuilding your checkout.

direct.title: Direct bank payment
direct.body: Players pay directly from their bank.

onboarding.title: From payment flow to live processing.
onboarding.body: We map your payment flow, complete KYB, integrate, test, and support launch.

map.title: Map payment flow
map.body: Understand your deposit flow, markets, volume, and current payment friction.

kyb.title: Complete KYB
kyb.body: Collect company details, required documents, and approvals.

integrate.title: Integrate & test
integrate.body: Set up payment flows, callbacks, reporting, and test journeys.

golive.title: Go live
golive.body: Launch with monitoring, support, and a clear handover.

about.title: Built for predictable money movement.
about.body: Founded in Denmark in 2017, Aryze PSP builds payment infrastructure for predictable money movement.

focus.label: Focus
focus.body: Bank payments and digital money infrastructure.

access.label: Access
access.body: UK licence via partnership. Mastercard Open Banking rails.

demoCta.title: Ready to cut transaction costs?
demoCta.body: Book a short call and we'll map your payment flow and potential fit.

calculator.title: Estimate your savings.
calculator.body: See what fixed pricing could mean for your business.
calculator.disclaimer: Indicative estimate only. Actual pricing depends on transaction volume, payment flow, and commercial setup.

result.savingNote: Based on your current card fee compared with indicative Aryze fixed transaction pricing.
result.negativeNote: Current card pricing may be cheaper at this payment amount.

hero.title: Launch a simple stablecoin faster.
hero.body: A coming-soon deployment flow for builders and technical teams with a clear stablecoin idea.

stablecoinFactory.forBody: Builders, technical teams, product teams, innovation teams, and exploratory operators.
stablecoinFactory.helpsBody: Moving from stablecoin concept to simple deployment without a long enterprise process.

comingSoon.title: This product page is not active yet.
comingSoon.body: Pay by Bank is the current focus. Stablecoin Factory remains part of the Aryze product architecture.

hero.title: Operate digital cash properly.
hero.body: A coming-soon infrastructure layer for already-licensed institutions with real digital cash operating needs.

digitalCash.forBody: Already-licensed institutions with digital cash, settlement, treasury, liquidity, or value-movement use cases.
digitalCash.helpsBody: Operating digital cash under the institution's own licence, governance, and control.

comingSoon.title: This product page is not active yet.
comingSoon.body: Pay by Bank is the current focus. Digital Cash remains the institutional infrastructure direction in the Aryze product suite.

intro.title: Get sandbox access for Pay by Bank
intro.body: Test a direct account-to-account payment flow built for merchants that need faster settlement, lower payment friction, and stronger control over incoming payments.
intro.body2: Tell us about your business, payment setup, and what you want to test. We'll use this to understand whether Pay by Bank is the right fit and prepare the right sandbox access for your use case.

aside.title: Built for payment-driven merchants
aside.body: Pay by Bank is designed for merchants where payments affect margin, settlement, cash flow, customer experience, chargebacks, refunds, reconciliation, and daily operations.

benefits.one: Test the payment flow before going live
benefits.two: Share your payment setup and use case
benefits.three: Get the right sandbox access for your business

form.consent: By submitting this form, you agree that Aryze may contact you about your sandbox request and related product information.

fields.businessType: What type of business are you?
fields.paymentFlow: Which payment flow do you want to improve or test?
fields.paymentMethods: Which payment methods do you use today?
fields.monthlyVolume: What is your estimated monthly transaction volume?
fields.averageSize: What is your average transaction size?
fields.paymentChallenges: What are your main payment challenges today?
fields.sandboxTests: What do you want to test in the sandbox?
fields.technicalTeam: Do you have a technical team ready to test?
fields.testingStart: When would you like to start testing?
fields.additionalContextPlaceholder: Tell us about your payment flow, current setup, or what you want to test.

paymentChallenges.reconciliation: Reconciliation takes too much manual work
paymentChallenges.alternative: We want a better alternative to card rails

techReadiness.commercialFirst: No, we need commercial review first

success.resendTitle: Thank you — we'll be in touch.
success.mailtoTitle: Your sandbox request email is ready.
success.resendBody: Your sandbox request has been sent to the Aryze team. Expect a response within one business day with the next steps.
success.mailtoBody: Your mail app should open with the sandbox request addressed to Aryze. Send the email to share your company, payment use case, and technical setup.
